center.name: 康厄安群島
center.summary: 康厄安群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括褐翅鸦鹃、Cave swiftlet、Cerulean kingfisher等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The cave swiftlet is native to Malaysia and Indonesia. It is found in the Sundaic region, in Java, Madura Island, Bawean, Kangean Island, Nusa Penida, Bali and Lombok, parts of Sumatra, and the western slopes of Mount Kinabalu on Sabah, Borneo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The cerulean kingfisher is native to Sumatra, Java, the Kangean Islands, Bali, Lombok and Sumbawa, all in Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This cuckooshrike is found in the Thai-Malay Peninsula, Sumatra, Borneo, the Philippines, and many small islands in the area, such as the Kangean Islands and Natuna Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The wing is paler rufous in this race. * Race anonymus Stresemann, 1913 — found in the southwestern Philippines (Basilan, Sulu Islands) and is shorter and darker winged than bubutus. * Race kangeangensis Vorderman, 1893 — found in the Kangean Islands
